Bovine Breed Classifier

Modern breed intelligence for Indian cattle.

Upload a photo, explore breed insights, and keep track of every prediction and chat history in one clean dashboard.

FastAPI backend

Image classification, breed details, and chatbot support powered by the existing API.

History built in

Your recent predictions and chat sessions are stored securely in the browser.

Clean, responsive dashboard

Minimal UI with adaptive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

Classifier & breed info

Drag, drop, preview, and auto-fetch breed data after each prediction.

AI chat flows

Query the cattle assistant and keep your conversations easy to revisit later.
